lesson.menu_desc: Passive voice (all tenses) + court procedure vocabulary -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 9 -- The Passive Court: describing legal procedures in the passive voice.
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Luiz Bressane | Aula 9 -- The Passive Court

listenings.text: Good morning. This is the clerk of the criminal court. The following announcements concern today's docket. The hearing in the case of the State versus Andrade has been moved to courtroom four. All counsel are asked to check in with the bailiff before ten o'clock. The afternoon session will be adjourned early, as a short recess has been scheduled for the swearing-in of new officers. Any motion that has not yet been filed must be submitted to the front desk by noon. Thank you for your attention.

You are listening to the legal affairs update. In the headline case this week, the defendant was remanded into custody after bail was denied by the judge. A search warrant had been issued the previous night, and several documents were seized. Defense counsel argued that the evidence should not be admitted, because full disclosure had not been made to the other side. The hearing was adjourned until Friday, when a ruling on the motion is expected. We will bring you more as the story develops.
